name: Potage Parisienne, from "La Tour" Restaurant
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until transparent.
2. Add flour and mix well.
3. Gradually add 3 cups chicken stock, stirring constantly and simmering slowly.
4. In a separate pot, combine the remaining 3 cups chicken stock, potatoes, and leek. Bring to a boil.
5. Simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Mix both pots together.
7. Add cream and season with salt.
8. Top with parsley. Makes 6 servings.
